question: Does the main company name on the truck read exactly 'RAPIDEX FREIGHT'?
Is the previous company name 'SWIFT' and 'LOGISTICS GROUP' completely absent from the truck?
Does the phone number at the bottom read exactly '1-800-727-4339'?
Does the website URL at the bottom read exactly 'www.rapidexfreight.com'?
Are the old phone number ('1-800-555-SHIP') and website ('www.swiftlogistics.com') completely removed?
Does the new text maintain the navy blue color and bold font style consistent with the original branding?
Is the new text aligned correctly with the perspective and curvature of the truck body?
Is the globe logo with the arrow on the left side preserved and unchanged?
Is the top slogan 'SAFETY FIRST • DRIVE RESPONSIBLY • PROTECT LIVES' preserved and unchanged?
Are the service list lines (e.g., 'Nationwide LTL Freight', 'Warehousing & Distribution') preserved and unchanged?
Is the word 'Call' still present immediately before the phone number?
Are the two QR codes and the text 'SCAN TO SHIP EASY' on the right side preserved?
Is the truck cab, wheels, and the yellow reflective safety strip along the bottom unchanged?
Is the new text free from spelling errors, typos, or gibberish?
Are the edited areas free from visible artifacts, blurring, or color bleeding?
Do the lighting and reflections on the new text appear natural and consistent with the rest of the truck panel?
